site.title: Data
site.tagline: Data projects — visualization, quality, and more
site.author: Antonio Aureliano

approaches.label: Data Visualization
approaches.desc: Interactive ways to explore data — graphs, maps, diagrams.

approaches.label: Data Quality
approaches.desc: Validation, cleaning, and monitoring of the dataset.

approaches.label: Pipeline / ETL
approaches.desc: Collecting, transforming, and syncing the data sources.

approaches.label: Data Prediction
approaches.desc: Models and predictions from the data (statistics and machine learning).

projects.title: Conexões da História
projects.summary: Interactive D3.js graph mapping the historical connections between people, places, and events in Recife and Pernambuco, with a data-quality (fill rate) panel.

projects.title: Historical Connections — Base Cleaning
projects.summary: Cleaning and validating the Conexões da História base: completeness (fill rate), uniqueness, integrity, and validity of nodes and connections.

projects.title: Prediction of attendance in events organized through Facebook
projects.summary: Predict how many people will actually attend events created on Facebook, from event features and RSVP signals.
